title: Write a worker with priority 0 (highest)
prompt: Create `MyApp.Workers.CriticalPaymentWorker` (queue `:payments`) that runs at priority 0 (highest priority in Oban's 0..9 scale). It accepts `%{"payment_id" => id}` and calls `MyApp.Payments.process(id)`. Include a comment on the priority line noting that 0 is highest, 9 is lowest. Write to `lib/my_app/workers/critical_payment_worker.ex`.
tier_rationale: Single option on the `use` call + a correct comment; tests the inverted 0=highest intuition.
research_citation: Oban.Worker HexDocs — 'Integer from 0 (highest priority) to 9 (lowest priority). Defaults to 0.'
